---
title: "Ethics and interpretation"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Ethics and interpretation}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

Digital traces are behavioural, cultural, linguistic, and platform-mediated signals. They can reflect media events, internet access, language dominance, bots, search-engine policy, and platform demographics.

```{r}
library(conCultuR)
platform_terms_report(c("google", "wikipedia", "gdelt"))
ethics_check(data.frame(platform = c("wikipedia", "gdelt")), platforms = c("wikipedia", "gdelt"))
```

Minimum reporting checklist:

- query dictionary
- query ambiguity audit
- platform coverage
- standardisation method
- collection date and platform terms
- distinction between public attention and conservation value
- whether raw text or user-level data were collected
